title: Failure when assert/assume'ing signals will only change on posedge of a clock
body:
I'm getting the [same vs assert/assume problem](https://github.com/cliffordwolf/yosys/issues/447) with constructs such as:
```
always @($global_clock)
if (!$rose(i_clk))
begin
     // etc.
end
```
Not sure if it's the [same issue as before](https://github.com/cliffordwolf/yosys/issues/447) or not, but this one requires a [new test case](http://zipcpu.com/tmp/ybug2.tgz).

Dan
